changelog:
• Fixed the Auto Updater for the Madium API – it now correctly updates all dependent files.
• Fixed the LSP connection – resolved issues where API changes could cause sudden disconnections and prevent reconnection on previously created ports.
• Updated hardware acceleration – GPU-based rendering of animations, effects, and UI elements is now significantly smoother and more efficient.
• Fixed automatic shutdown of existing processes, as well as created hosts and sockets by the Madium API and Xeno when closing the application.
